text.title: growth-twitter-x-growth Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for growth-twitter-x-growth. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Thread tweet 1 must standalone as a compelling post without reading the rest — it is the main distribution surface. External links reduce reach; put links in the first reply or bio.
rule.rationale: X's algorithm uses tweet 1 engagement (likes, retweets, bookmarks) to decide whether to distribute the rest of the thread. A weak tweet 1 kills the whole thread.

rule.statement: Track profile visits, follower growth rate, engagement rate, thread views, and newsletter signups from Twitter as primary KPIs.
rule.rationale: Follower count alone is misleading. Profile visits and newsletter signups measure conversion from attention to audience relationship.
